description: Alice schedules one event with Bob and a separate event with Carol, with each pair explicitly defined.

events.title: Contract Review

events.title: Marketing Proposal Review

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 2 events: contract review (Alice and Bob) on Monday and marketing proposal review (Alice and Carol) on Wednesday.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Monday=Feb 23, Wednesday=Feb 25. Bob is explicitly excluded from the Wednesday event.
